child_sections.summary: In Stage A, the agent must declare which intent it is currently executing (intent_id + intent_type). This triggers automatic context injection (loading relevant specs, repo rules, and prior intent history). Only after the context injection is confirmed does the agent

child_sections.title: To improve implementation clarity, hooks operate on a structured context payload
child_sections.summary: To improve implementation clarity, hooks operate on a structured context payload: export interface HookContext { sessionId: string; stage: "INTENT_SELECTION" | "CONTEXT_INJECTION" | "TOOL_EXECUTION"; intentId?: string; intentType?: string; toolName?: string; args?: any; timestamp: string; workspaceRoot: string; injecte

child_sections.title: Hooks must always run in a stable order:
child_sections.summary: Hooks must always run in a stable order: 1. PreIntentSelection 2. PostIntentSelection 3. PreToolUse 4. PostToolUse 5. OnToolError ✅ Decision 4: Artifacts Must Capture Payloads All trace logs must store both:  the agent decision payload (intent selection)  the
